stories.title: Wheeler Snub: Phillies Ace Turns Down All-Star Replacement, Calls System "BS"
stories.angle: Wheeler's reaction is the must-read All-Star story of the week. A pitcher with a 2.28 ERA being snubbed at his own home park, then turning down a fifth-pick replacement offer, is a legitimate outrage narrative with real substance behind it.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Zack Wheeler — 2.28 ERA, 98 Ks in 87 innings, 14 strikeouts in his last start.

Not selected as an NL All-Star. Offered a replacement spot. And he turned it DOWN.

"I didn't want to be a FIFTH CHOICE."

#BallparkBanter #Phillies #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Jimmy Rollins: "I 100 percent believe he was snubbed."

Wheeler's agent called MLB's handling "tone deaf." The game is being played at Citizens Bank Park — his home park.

This thread pulls all week. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #Phillies #AllStarGame

x_posts.label: Post 1-3
x_posts.text:
2.28 ERA. 98 Ks. His home park. And Zack Wheeler wasn't on the All-Star roster. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #Phillies #MLB

article.headline: Zack Wheeler Turned Down His Own All-Star Game: 'I Didn't Want to Be a Fifth Choice'

research.facts:
Wheeler Snub — Phillies Ace Turns Down Replacement
**Decision:** NEW STORY (emerged July 11 — reaction to non-selection + Wheeler declining replacement are new)
**Sources:**
- https://sports.yahoo.com/mlb/article/zack-wheeler-expresses-frustration-over-all-star-snub-after-striking-out-14-reds-i-feel-like-ive-earned-it-192926243.html (July 11, 2026)
- https://www.cbssports.com/mlb/news/phillies-zack-wheeler-all-star-game-snub-sunday-start/ (July 11, 2026)
- https://www.espn.com/mlb/story/_/id/49303496/irked-all-star-snub-wheeler-fans-14-phillies-top-reds (July 11, 2026)
- https://www.inquirer.com/phillies/jimmy-rollins-and-fans-reactions-zack-wheeler-all-star-snub-20260711.html (July 11, 2026)
- https://heavy.com/sports/mlb/philadelphia-phillies/zack-wheeler-reaction-all-star-game-snub/ (July 11, 2026)
**Key Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Wheeler stats through 14 starts: **2.28 ERA, 98 K in 87 innings**
- Not selected as NL All-Star (scheduling rule: pitchers who pitched on the Sunday before the game are ineligible)
- Struck out 14 batters vs. Cincinnati Reds in his last start (the ineligibility start)
- Offered a replacement spot when Ohtani and others withdrew — **declined**
- Wheeler's words: "I didn't want to be a fifth choice"
- Wheeler on the rule: "Just because I pitch on a certain day, I can't pitch an All-Star Game, or even be there, or get the recognition for it. It pisses me off. I feel like I've earned it"
- Agent B.B. Abbott: called MLB's handling "tone deaf"
- Jimmy Rollins: "I 100 percent believe he was snubbed… Zack Wheeler has been doing it for a while"
- Context: The All-Star Game is at Citizens Bank Park — Wheeler's home park — making the snub uniquely painful
**Freshness:** July 11 — carries through All-Star Week. HIGH confidence on all facts.

stories.title: Home Run Derby TOMORROW — Harper, Schwarber, and Philadelphia's Night
stories.angle: Two Phillies, their home park, the first Netflix Derby. Schwarber is MLB's HR leader. Harper won this event here before. The city of Philadelphia has one more night before the All-Star Game.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
TOMORROW night at Citizens Bank Park: the Home Run Derby is live on Netflix for the first time.

Bryce Harper (2018 Derby champion) and Kyle Schwarber (MLB's active home run leader) — both Phillies, both playing at home. 🍿

#BallparkBanter #HRDerby #Phillies

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
No shot clock this year — 20 swings in round 1, 15 each after that.

The strongest pure hitter wins. That's Kyle Schwarber. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #HRDerby #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-3
x_posts.text:
Two Phillies. Their home park. Netflix. Tomorrow at 8 PM ET. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #HRDerby #Phillies

article.headline: Home Run Derby Is Tomorrow — Two Phillies, Their Home Park, and Netflix's Big Night

research.facts:
Home Run Derby — TOMORROW (July 13)
**Decision:** FOLLOW UP (field announced July 11; now one day out — final preview)
**Sources:**
- https://www.mlb.com/news/2026-mlb-home-run-derby-participants (within past week)
- https://www.netflix.com/tudum/features/mlb-home-run-derby-live-on-netflix (current)
- https://www.mlb.com/press-release/press-release-complete-field-of-participants-set-for-2026-t-mobile-home-run-derby (recent)
- https://fansided.com/mlb/every-home-run-derby-participant-confirmed-for-the-2026-field (recent)
**Key Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- **Date: Monday July 13, 8:00 PM ET** — confirmed (NOT July 14 — clarified from conflicting pipeline status entries)
- **Broadcast: Netflix** (first time Derby on Netflix), Citizens Bank Park
- **8-person field:**
1. Bryce Harper (PHI) — 2018 Derby champion, playing at his home park
2. Kyle Schwarber (PHI) — MLB's current home run leader
3. Jac Caglianone (KC Royals) — 2025 runner-up
4. Junior Caminero (TB Rays) — first confirmed participant for 2026
5. Willson Contreras (BOS Red Sox)
6. Munetaka Murakami (CWS) — also in MLB news from draft; 2nd Japanese-born participant (after Ohtani 2021)
7. Ben Rice (NYY)
8. Jordan Walker (STL)
- **Format change:** 20 swings round 1, 15 each rounds 2 and 3 (no shot clock/timer — removed for first time in a decade)
- Two Phillies in the field playing at their home park is noteworthy
**Freshness:** Event is tomorrow. Preview content highly timely.

stories.title: Draft Recap — Cholowsky Goes No. 1, White Sox Begin Their Rebuild
stories.angle: The choice is made. Analysis of what Cholowsky brings, the historical company he joins, and what it means for Chicago's rebuild.

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Roch Cholowsky — .320/.452/.636, 21 HRs at UCLA — is the No. 1 overall pick.

The White Sox just landed "the best all-around college shortstop prospect since Tulowitzki." ⚾

#BallparkBanter #MLBDraft #WhiteSox

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
The last time the White Sox picked No. 1 overall was 1977 — and they got Harold Baines, a Hall of Famer.

This time: a shortstop off a 41-121 season who's already in FIRST PLACE. The rebuild is happening. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #WhiteSox #MLBDraft

x_posts.label: Post 3-3
x_posts.text:
No. 1 overall. Chicago's future shortstop is here. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #MLBDraft #WhiteSox

research.facts:
MLB Draft Recap — Cholowsky No. 1 Overall
**Decision:** FOLLOW UP (July 11 pipeline covered the preview; now the confirmed result)
**Sources:**
- https://www.mlb.com/whitesox/news/white-sox-draft-roch-cholowsky-first-overall-2026 (July 11, 2026)
- https://www.espn.com/mlb/story/_/id/49306565/2026-mlb-draft-tracker-live-updates-order-results-analysis-every-first-round-pick (July 11, 2026)
- https://www.cbssports.com/mlb/news/roch-cholowsky-white-sox-2026-mlb-draft/ (July 11, 2026)
- https://www.southsidesox.com/white-sox-mlb-draft/130435/white-sox-select-ss-roch-cholowsky-in-the-first-round-of-the-2026-mlb-draft-no-1-overall (July 11, 2026)
**Key Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- **Pick confirmed: Chicago White Sox selected UCLA SS Roch Cholowsky No. 1 overall**
- Announced at 12:43 PM CT on Saturday July 11
- 2026 UCLA stats: **.320/.452/.636, 21 HR, 60 RBI**
- Only the third college shortstop ever taken No. 1 overall: Bill Almon (1974), Dansby Swanson (2015), Roch Cholowsky (2026)
- MLB Pipeline assessment: "the best all-around college shortstop prospect since Troy Tulowitzki" and "big league ready in a hurry"
- White Sox's first No. 1 pick since Harold Baines in 1977
- Draft Day 2 continues Sunday — Rounds 5-20 at Pennsylvania Convention Center
**Freshness:** Draft pick made July 11. Day 2 analysis on July 12 is natural timing.

stories.title: Skubal Trade Watch + Ohtani Knee Update — Two Big Second-Half Questions
stories.angle: The two biggest second-half storylines crystallize at the break: what happens to Skubal, and when do the superstars return?

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text:
The Yankees have two aces on the IL and a broken MVP. 22 days until the trade deadline.

Tarik Skubal is available. There is no scenario where New York doesn't overpay. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #Yankees #MLBTradeDeadline

x_posts.label: Post 4-2

Ohtani's knee. Judge's rib. Skubal's future. The second half of 2026 has three big questions. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Yankees

research.facts:
Skubal Trade + Ohtani Knee + Judge Rib Update
**Decision:** FOLLOW UP (all three tracked separately; combining at the break for a "second-half questions" frame)
**Sources:**
- https://www.espn.com/mlb/story/_/id/48968175/2026-mlb-trade-deadline-tarik-skubal-offers-tigers-dodgers-yankees-cubs-brewers-braves (ESPN, July 6)
- https://www.espn.com/mlb/story/_/id/49306462/2026-mlb-trade-deadline-addition-top-contender-moves-dodgers-brewers-braves-yankees-phillies (ESPN, recent)
- https://sports.yahoo.com/articles/tigers-rumors-tarik-skubal-trade-165042478.html (Yahoo Sports, recent)
- https://abc7.com/post/shohei-ohtani-will-not-pitch-diamondbacks-miss-2026-star-game-because-knee-irritation-dodgers-say/19482166/ (July 10, 2026)
- https://www.mlb.com/news/shohei-ohtani-to-miss-last-start-of-second-half-2026-all-star-game (July 10, 2026)
- https://bleacherreport.com/articles/25448396-aaron-judges-timeline-return-yankees-broken-rib-injury-updated-aaron-boone (recent)
- https://www.mlb.com/news/aaron-judge-injury-reimaging-brian-cashman-yankees (recent)
**Skubal Key Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Trade deadline: **August 3 at 6:00 PM ET (22 days from July 12)**
- Tigers record: 37-49, 6.5 games out of Wild Card
- Two-time reigning AL Cy Young winner; final year of contract before free agency
- Skubal himself is lobbying Tigers to BUY: "if they don't think what we have is a World Series-caliber team, the whole team is going to look different"
- **Yankees frontrunners** — Rodón (elbow) + Fried (elbow) both on IL; rotation in crisis
- Phillies also linked — Skubal + Sánchez would be historically dominant
- Dodgers, Cubs, Brewers also in the picture per ESPN
**Ohtani Key Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Left knee irritation — fluid removed + likely injection during All-Star break
- Out of All-Star Game (was leading vote-getter)
- Missed last start of first half (vs. D-backs) due to knee
- Dodgers: procedure not expected to affect second-half pitching availability
- Still available at DH during break
**Judge Key Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Fractured right rib, on IL since June 5
- Rib being reimaged during All-Star break
- Yankees GM Brian Cashman: "I don't think we're anticipating it's coming back clean. I think we're anticipating and hopeful that it's showing the healing process."
- Best-case return: August
- Named AL All-Star roster replacement (out for game)
**Freshness:** Ohtani news July 10. Skubal market is ongoing. Judge reimaging is break-week news.

stories.title: AL Central at the Break — White Sox Up 1 on Cleveland + JJ Wetherholt Signs $112.5M Extension
stories.angle: Two stories: the AL Central race heading into the second half, and a franchise-building commitment by St. Louis.

x_posts.label: Post 5-1
x_posts.text:
Two years ago, the Chicago White Sox lost 121 games.

At the All-Star break in 2026: 45-40, in FIRST PLACE in the AL Central. One game ahead of Cleveland.

The most interesting turnaround in baseball. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #WhiteSox #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 5-2
x_posts.text:
45-40. First place. From worst in baseball to the top of the AL Central. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #WhiteSox #MLB

research.facts:
AL Central Standings + Wetherholt Extension
**Decision:** NEW STORY (standings snapshot at break; Wetherholt extension July 10 — first coverage)
**Sources:**
- https://www.mlb.com/standings (current)
- https://www.statmuse.com/mlb/ask/the-al-central-standings (recent)
- Transaction trackers — Wetherholt extension multiple sources July 10, 2026
**Key Facts (HIGH confidence for standings; HIGH for Wetherholt):**
- AL Central at break:
- **White Sox: 45-40** (1st, leading by 1 game)
- **Guardians: 45-42** (2nd, 1 game back)
- **Twins: 42-46** (3rd, ~3.5 back)
- **Tigers: 37-49** (4th, 6.5 back — sellers)
- White Sox context: from 41-121 in 2024 to first place at the break in 2026
- Munetaka Murakami (CWS) is in the Home Run Derby — ongoing All-Star visibility
**Wetherholt Extension (HIGH confidence):**
- JJ Wetherholt (2B, St. Louis Cardinals) signed **8-year, $112.5 million extension** — announced July 10, 2026
- One of the most promising young bats in the NL; Cardinals are locking him up long-term
- Extension announced during All-Star Week for maximum visibility
